content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://search.proquest.com/openview/09ea717674e23c42c13d37d9537370c8/1?pq-origsite=gscholar&cbl=18750&diss=y", "source_title": "Combining expert opinions to assess risk of change in earth systems: Permafrost collapse, global wildfire, and water security", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "The ground here consists of permafrost \u2014 soil, sediment, rock and ice that often remains at or below 0 degrees Celsius year-round.", "direct_quote": "The ground here consists of permafrost \u2014 soil, sediment, rock and ice that often remains at or below 0 degrees Celsius year-round.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Permafrost covers approximately 22.8 million square kilometres in the Arctic, sub-Arctic and alpine regions \u2014 comprising nearly a quarter of...", "direct_quote": "Permafrost covers approximately 22.8 million square kilometres in the Arctic, sub-Arctic and alpine regions \u2014 comprising nearly a quarter of the exposed land surface in the northern hemisphere. \u2014 In Alaska, 85% of the state lies within the permafrost", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Scientists began seriously worrying about climate change impacts on permafrost about 15 years ago, but not only because of degraded infrastr...", "direct_quote": "Scientists began seriously worrying about climate change impacts on permafrost about 15 years ago, but not only because of degraded infrastructure.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
